title: viburnum opulus var. sargentii
intro: Viburnum opulus var. sargentii, also known as the smooth-leaf cranberrybush, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern Asia, characterized by its compact growth habit and showy white flowers that bloom in late spring. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Viburnum opulus var. sargentii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
